creator: selkoshairi@coloadvisor.com
text:
Hi Johann-

My apologies. Should I resubmit or edit the entry or could you accept it 
like this:

--
ColoAdvisor finds the best fit hosting, colocation and cloud computing 
services based on technical, geographical and financial needs. Contact 
us for an immediate site assessment and to begin the process. Our email 
address is info@coloadvisor.com or contact us at +1-877-732-4003 and 
press 1 to speak to an advisor for a free consultation.
--

Best wishes,

Shirin



Johann Kois wrote:

> In order to process this PR we would need some contact information,
> meaning a website and/or an email address.
>
> Please look at the other entries in the consultant list for an example:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult_bycat.html
>
> jkois
